source_text: McLaren Drivers Norris and Piastri Hope for Better at Austria Qualifying
current_zh: McLaren Drivers Norris和Piastri Hope for better at Austrial Qualification 互联网档案馆的存檔,存档日期2013-12-21. 诺里斯驾驶员和Piastri Hope for Better at Austrial Qualification

source_text: f1 nation podcast on oscar's drive in austria 😌 "i'd ask him “have you ever driven a better race?”. he was outstanding" "the kind of race a championship caliber driver has to pull off" "when he's 65 they'll ask him about his best race and [he'll talk about this one]"
current_zh: f1 nation podcast on oscar's drive in austria 😌 "i'd ask him “have you ever driven a better race?”. he was outstanding" "the kind of race a championship caliber driver has to pull off" "when he's 65 they'll ask him about his best race and [he'll talk about this one]"

notes: 疑似机器翻译残留英文功能词：in, was, the, of, driver, to。 | 新闻标题/摘要疑似仍为英文兜底，需要人工判断是否中文化。
